calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:45 A.M.: THIS CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DAY AS PREVIOUSLY SCHEDULED, WITH THE COURT, REPRESENTATIVES FOR BOTH PARTIES AND COURTROOM PERSONNEL PRESENT.

THE COURT MAKES PRELIMINARY STATEMENTS TO BOTH SIDES, FOLLOWED BY REPRESENTATIVE FOR RWT GROUP, INC. PROVIDING RESPONSES TO THE COURT AND FURTHER FOLLOWED BY RESPONSES TO THE COURT BY VAN SALES, INC.

10:00 A.M.; AFTER HEARING STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND AFTER INQUIRING FURTHR FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION REGARDING THE CAUSE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PARTIES ARE NOTIFIED BY THE COURT THEY WILL RECEIVE THE COURT'S NOTICE IN THE MAIL.

10:05 A.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED (CLERK: M.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED; D-525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Continued To Sep-14-16 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
